news.t: ETF Launch Engine: Record-Setting Pace in 2026
Wedbush Launches Another Dan Ives ETF. Why It's Unusual.
Wedbush Launches AI Power & Infrastructure ETF as Energy Becomes the Key Force Behind the AI Boom

holdings.infoBox: IVEP is an equity ETF with a total of 32 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 5.16%, Quanta Services at 4.36%, GE Vernova at 4.14%, Schneider Electric S.E. at 4.10%, and Vertiv Holdings Co at 4.10%.

overview.description: The Dan IVES Wedbush AI Power & Infrastructure ETF (IVEP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index, targeting companies of all capitalizations globally that are considered positioned to benefit from further build out of artificial intelligence. These companies focus on four areas within energy and infrastructure needs IVEP was launched on Apr 8, 2026 and is issued by Wedbush.
infoTable: Solactive Wedbush AI Power & Infrastructure Index

data.title: ETF Launch Engine: Record-Setting Pace in 2026
data.text: The engine of ETF innovation is firing on all cylinders. As the second quarter gains momentum, the industry is on a record-setting pace for both launches and inflows.

data.title: Wedbush Launches Another Dan Ives ETF. Why It's Unusual.
data.text: The firm launched the Dan IVES Wedbush AI Power & Infrastructure exchange-traded fund.

data.title: Wedbush Launches AI Power & Infrastructure ETF as Energy Becomes the Key Force Behind the AI Boom
data.text: IVEP ETF is launched by Wedbush Fund Advisers to give investors exposure to the companies powering the next phase of the artificial intelligence boom.
